nodes.name: The Peregrine Fund
nodes.summary: The Peregrine Fund是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Red-necked buzzard、Madagascar buzzard、Red-thighed sparrowhawk，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Madagascar buzzard
nodes.summary: Madagascar buzzard（Madagascar buzzard，学名 Buteo brachypterus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于The Peregrine Fund。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Endemic to Madagascar where it is common, except for the deforested central plateau where it is less common, there is some indication that its population is increasing as the forest is fragmented. The Madagascar buzzard is adaptable as to its habitat and is found in a wide variety of habitats including forest, open woodland and regenerating, secondary forest. It can also be found on rocky hillsides up to 2300 metres above sea level. Although it is so adaptable it is still less common on the deforested central plateau
